response.overview: Those who for some reason were unable to witness the brilliant tribute paid to the national aviator Juan Bielovucic can now contemplate it from a seat in the Olimpo Theater. The theater was packed, and the clear film, whose length of more than five hundred meters depicts in its smallest details Bielovucic's disembarkation in Callao, his arrival at the Desamparados Station, the journey along Jirón de la Unión, and the parade in front of his home on Avenida de La Colmena, was enthusiastically applauded. This film, like the previous ones premiered in this theater, was developed by the well-known photographer Mr. Lund, and is undoubtedly one of the best, since the minor defects noticeable in the previous films, which were only apparent to experts in the art of photography, have completely disappeared in this one.
response.title: La llegada de Bielovucic
